title: statice delicatula var. tournefortii
intro: Statice delicatula var. tournefortii, also known as annual statice or small statice, is an annual flowering plant in the family Plumbaginaceae, commonly found in the Mediterranean region and other parts of Europe. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and skin problems, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of statice delicatula var. tournefortii include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Statice delicatula var. tournefortii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
